title: DE55 5NH, WANZL Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/HP3244QD/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: WANZL Limited Installation name: Tibshelf Plating Works Permit number: EPR/HP3244QD/V003  "
